world.name: World Overview (全球底图)
world.description: Global basemap containing landmasses, country boundaries and oceans for zoom 0-5. Perfect offline canvas.

china.name: China Overview (中国概况底图)
china.description: Full country overview containing administrative lines, national expressways and major capital nodes for zoom 6-8.

liaoning_overview.name: Liaoning Overview (辽宁省概况图)
liaoning_overview.description: Provincial overview showing city positions, expressways, national roads, railways, and major water bodies for zoom 9-11.

zhenxing_detail.name: Zhenxing Detail (振兴区详细图)
zhenxing_detail.description: High-resolution detail tiles for Zhenxing district urban core, highlighting streets, riverfront paths, and neighborhood POIs for zoom 12-17.

yuanbao_detail.name: Yuanbao Detail (元宝区详细图)
yuanbao_detail.description: High-resolution detail tiles for Yuanbao district center, containing roads, residential blocks, and scenic mountain areas for zoom 12-17.

zhenan_detail.name: Zhenan Detail (振安区详细图)
zhenan_detail.description: High-resolution detail tiles for the surrounding Zhenan suburban region, showing local transport grids and hills for zoom 12-17.

donggang_detail.name: Donggang Detail (东港市详细图)
donggang_detail.description: High-resolution detail tiles for Donggang coastal city, including harbor areas, agricultural plains, and streets for zoom 12-17.

fengcheng_detail.name: Fengcheng Detail (凤城市详细图)
fengcheng_detail.description: High-resolution detail tiles for Fengcheng, displaying mountain topography, railways, national highway routes, and towns for zoom 12-17.

kuandian_detail.name: Kuandian Detail (宽甸县详细图)
kuandian_detail.description: High-resolution detail tiles for Kuandian Manchu Autonomous County, featuring dense forest topography, reservoirs, and roads for zoom 12-17.
